command: beagle gt='out/phased_vcf.vcf.gz' ref='benchmarks/tests/fixtures/corpora/vcf-mini/variants/vcf_mini_reference_panel.vcf' map='artifacts/reference_assets/Homo sapiens/GRCh38/vcf-assets/maps/hsapiens_grch38_chr_map/recombination_map.tsv.gz' out='out/imputed_vcf' impute=true nthreads=8 seed=42 > 'out/imputed_vcf.log' 2>&1 && bcftools index -t 'out/imputed_vcf.vcf.gz'
